title: cirsium scopulorum
intro: Cirsium scopulorum, also known as Mountain Thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cirsium scopulorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Mountain Thistle can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
